category_sources: source_facts.description says DAMASK is a multi-physics crystal plasticity simulation package; official DAMASK homepage describes multiphysics materials simulation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is damask-grid and source_facts.executables lists DAMASK_grid; official DAMASK docs refer to the Grid solver.
docs_sources: Official DAMASK homepage links documentation/usage.html#grid-solver for the fast spectral grid solver.
Official DAMASK source-code installation page documents Grid and Mesh Solver build steps.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official DAMASK source-code page instructs cloning https://github.com/damask-multiphysics/DAMASK.git, and the GitHub README identifies it as the public mirror of the principal DAMASK repository.
tags_sources: Official DAMASK source-code page documents grid solver installation.
source_facts.description names multi-physics crystal plasticity simulation and current_curation.tags includes cli.
